properties.Effects: Emits a decent amount of light green light in the direction it's facing.

name: Festive Potted Tree
description: Show off your base's holiday spirit with this limited-edition festive potted tree! 2017 Holiday item.

properties.Effects: Multiplies ore value by x5

name: Festive Wall
description: A well-decorated wall from the 2015 Holiday Event. Don't worry, no one will get through.

properties.Effects: Gives you $​$​$​ particle effects.

name: Giant Building Brick

name: Renegade Oblivion Weaver
description: Lurking in the Void is the Oblivion Weaver: these beasts consume antimatter and use it to create super-charged explosions. Maybe those explosions can be of use to you.

properties.Effects: *Base multiplier of x50 · *Wet ores get processed at x100

properties.Effects: (''see overview'')

properties.Overview:
The Daestrophe is a [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Superstitious Superstitious]-tier resetting device added in the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Reincarnation_Update Reincarnation Update], based off of the god of Void, {{Color|#ff3b30|[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Daegel Daegel]}}.

The Daestrophe acts as another [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Resetting_Device Resetting Device], resetting all Machine tags for that ore. It also multiplies ore value by x100 with an additional x2 if the ore is on fire for a total of x200.

This upgrader is required to open the gate to The Heart of the Void, upgrading an ore from [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/The_Daegelart The Daegelart] to be processed in an [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Eternal_Limbo Eternal Limbo].

Upon placement, a {{Color|#ff0000|loud and deep laugh accompanied by thunder}} sound is heard across the server.
properties.Drawbacks:
* Incompatible with {{Glow|'''Void Drive'''}}
* Reduces {{Glow|{{Color|#80f2ff|Elysium Solemnity}}}} multiplier by 100,000

properties.Overview:
The Delta Phantom is a [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Superstitious Superstitious]-tier upgrader added in the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Reincarnation_Update Reincarnation Update].

The first 10 ores that pass through the Delta Phantom are all absorbed into the Delta signpiece, causing it to become increasingly neon pink. When the 11th ore travels through, all of the ores are released with a x100 multiplier, as well as the 11th ore receiving a x50 boost, for a total of x5000; the signpiece returns to a completely black colour. However, this 11th ore receives pink flames which will destroy the ore in 4 seconds unless extinguished.

{{Warning|'''WARNING:'''}} Ores absorbed by the Delta Phantom do not count towards the ore limit. When your ore limit is maxed out, it will '''NOT''' eject the stored ores.
properties.Drawbacks: Fire destroys 11th ore in 4 seconds.

name: Havium Mine
description: Born underground, grown inside a rocky womb. The earth is our cradle; the mountains shall become our tomb. Face us on the battlefield; you will meet your doom. We do not fear what lies beneath. We can never dig too deep.

properties.Source: Using the Catalyst of Earth and elements from Reborn-tier items with Draedon
properties.Overview:
The Havium Mine is a [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Superstitious Superstitious]-[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Tiers tier] [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Mine mine] added in the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Mine Reincarnation Update]. This mine's ores have the highest value in game and in addition to that, several bonus properties including immunity to poison, frostbite and radiation. The ore is also protected by 3 shields, a powerful attribute shared only by the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Mine SpookBaron-360,000]. These shields protect the ore from getting destroyed by anything except educators such as the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Draedon%27s_Gauntlet Draedon's Gauntlet]. All the 3 shields can be removed by the [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Witch%27s_Cauldron Witch's Cauldron], an [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Ore_Sawmill Ore Sawmill] or [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Ore_Chainsaw its successor].

As Havium ores are immune to poison, frostbite and radiation, they do not work with upgraders that require these attributes to work.

Upon placement, it emits the sound of torches being lit. This sound is shared with Pandora's Box.

This mine is based off of the now dead God of Earth in Miner's Haven lore, {{Color|#d83bff|[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Atalia Atalia]}}.
properties.Drawbacks:
'''Certain items remove all shields:'''
* [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Witch%27s_Cauldron Witch's Cauldron]
* [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Ore_Sawmill Ore Sawmill]
* [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Ore_Chainsaw Ore Chainsaw]

properties.Source: Using the Catalyst of Necromancy and elements from Reborn-tier items with Draedon
properties.Effects:
'''Before Meralin's Sorcery/standalone:''' 
* Multiplies ore value by x140 
* Random status effect is applied (see Overview)

'''After Meralin's Sorcery:''' 
* Multiplies ore value by x140 
* Replicator Ban and Anti-Gravity effects are removed from possible effects
properties.Overview:
The Methuselah's Mask is a [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Superstitious Superstitious]-[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Tiers tier] [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Aura aura] [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Upgrader upgrader] item added in [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/The_Magic_Update The Magic Update]. It is an area-of-effect upgrader based off of the demigod {{Color|#ac3efa|[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Methuselah Methuselah]}}. This upgrader multiplies ore value by 140x and gives the ore a random effect: {| ! Effects !! Probability |- | Ore is lit on {{Fire|fire}} || 1/4 each |- | Ore is made {{Radioactive|radioactive}} || 1/4 each |- | Ore is {{Poison|poisoned}} || 1/4 each |- | Ore is turned into coal * || 1/12 each |- | Ore is {{Color|#f6e58d|replicator banned}}
(Ore turns neon red, cannot be removed) || 1/12 each |- | Ore enters a state of {{Color|#f6e58d|anti-gravity}} for 3 seconds || 1/12 each |- | All ores enter a state of {{Color|#f6e58d|anti-gravity}} || 1/12000 |} When used after [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Meralin%27s_Sorcery Meralin's Sorcery], the replicator ban and anti-gravity effect can no longer be applied to ore. However, the rare effect of all ores being made anti-gravity is still possible. While an ore can still technically roll these two effects, they are not applied; the 140x multiplier is still applied as normal. > * Color changed to black, material to slate and given the "Coal" tag (powers industrial items). The ore proceeds like a normal ore; this is actually the only effect in this list that is not considered disadvantageous.
properties.Drawbacks: Ore is given a random status effect.
properties.Affects these Items/Multipliers: Meralin's Sorcery: turns multiplier range to x150-x220, size locks ore, does not poison

name: Big Fluxxus

properties.Source: Fusing 15 [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Big_Alberto Big Albertos] and 30 [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Skyliner_Flux Skyliner Fluxs] at {{Glow|{{Color|#3dff54|[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/The_Craftsman The Craftsman]}}}}
properties.Effects:
* First Upgrade: Multiplies ore value by {{Glow|x100}}
* Second Upgrade: Multiplies ore value by {{Glow|x300}}
properties.Overview:
The Big Fluxxus is a [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Advanced_Fusion Advanced Fusion]-[https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Tiers tier] [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Upgrader upgrader] added in the 10th anniversary update.

It can be used twice per [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Resetting_Device Resetting Device]: the first upgrade multiplies the ore by x100, and the second by x300. The ore must travel through the central hexagon of the upgrader in order to receive the multiplier.

This has a maximum potential of {{Glow|x24,300,000,000,000,000,000,000}} (~x24.3 sextillion), when used with all 4 [https://minershaven.fandom.com/wiki/Category:Resetting_Device Resetting Devices].
